description: MCP servers for Cloudflare. Includes the code-mode server (mcp.cloudflare.com) covering the full Cloudflare API with minimal token overhead, and domain-specific servers for Docs, Workers Bindings, Builds, Observability, Radar, Containers, Browser Rendering, Logpush, AI Gateway, Audit Logs, DNS Analytics, Digital Experience Monitoring, CASB, and GraphQL.
name: com.cloudflare/mcp

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Cloudflare API token as a Bearer token. Required if not using OAuth. Supports both user and account tokens.

headers.name: Authentication
headers.description: Optional Cloudflare API key for authentication if not using OAuth. Can use User or Account owned tokens as a Bearer token.
